news.title: TeraWulf (WULF) Lands $3.5 Billion Loan To Build Out Its AI Data Centers
news.summary: TeraWulf (NasdaqCM:WULF) arranged its first $3.5b leveraged loan to fund a large data center buildout. The financing is linked to a 20 year, $19b high performance computing lease with Anthropic. The new capital will support development of a data center campus in Kentucky focused on AI infrastructure. TeraWulf is moving further away from its roots in Bitcoin mining and leaning into AI infrastructure as a core business line. The stock trades around $23.2 and is up 9.5% over the past week and...

news.title: JGBs Edge Higher, Tracking Gains in U.S. Treasurys
news.summary: TREASURYS 0029 GMT — JGBs edge higher in morning Tokyo session, tracking overnight price gains in U.S. Treasurys. Both JGBs and Treasurys tend to move in tandem. JGB prices may also be buoyed by the latest decline in crude oil prices, which could lead to lower inflationary pressures in Japan and ease concerns over a rapid pace of BOJ rate increases.
